title: 3 Google updates from Galaxy Unpacked 2026
summary: Google launched the new Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 and Flip8 series featuring Gemini Intelligence to automate daily tasks across 40 popular apps. Gemini Intelligence can help you offload digital chores so you can spend less time behind a screen.
